headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $181
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $176 to $181.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $181

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Mid-cap stocks often strike the right balance between having proven business models and market opportunities that can support $100 billion corporations. However, they face intense competition from scaled industry giants and can be disrupted by new innovative players vying for a slice of the pie.
